steps.title: Spot the defining quality of first impression
steps.content: The key signal is “frustratingly dense prose” paired with readers who must “penetrate” it. This reveals that Hegel's works appear difficult or unclear on first glance, which is what the blank must describe.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Opaque directly means unclear and difficult to comprehend, matching “frustratingly dense prose” perfectly. The sentence then reads naturally: despite appearing opaque initially, Hegel's works have proven influential. The other choices miss or contradict this—authoritative suggests expertise (irrelevant), empirical discusses observation-based methods (off-topic), and facile means superficially easy (opposite of dense). That matches choice B — B is correct.
